workout_token.description: Unique app-side identifier for this workout (e.g. a UUID or slug)

workout_type_id.description: Workout type ID (e.g. 40 for indoor cycling, 25 for outdoor cycling, 1 for running)

starts.description: ISO 8601 datetime for when the workout starts. Must be within the current day through 6 days from now for the plan to appear in the ELEMNT app.

plan_id.description: ID of a previously created plan to attach to this workout

route_id.description: ID of a route to attach to this workout
